use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ACUTE CYANIDE POISONING THAT IS JUDGED TO BE LIFE THREATENING
SODIUM THIOSULFATE INJECTION IS INDICATED FOR SEQUENTIAL USE WITH SODIUM NITRITE FOR THE TREATMENT OF ACUTE CYANIDE POISONING
SODIUM THIOSULFATE INJECTION IS ADMINISTERED BY INTRAVENOUS INJECTION
